description: You are a Release Engineer optimizing a CI pipeline for the application at ~/projects/version-app/. The current Dockerfile is inefficient and buggy: the application fails to display the version number at runtime (showing "Version: None"), and changing the build version triggers a full rebuild of Python dependencies. Fix the Dockerfile to ensure the 'APP_VERSION' build argument is persisted as an environment variable in the running container and optimize the instruction order so that changing 'APP_VERSION' does not invalidate the 'pip install' cache. Verify the fix using build_and_run.sh. Login: user ga, password password123.
